# Aspose.Words Agent-Verified .NET Examples

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:START -->
# Aspose.Words Agent-Verified .NET Examples

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:START -->
## What this repository contains

This repository contains **build-verified** C#/.NET examples for **Aspose.Words** organized by **category folders**.

Examples are generated by an upstream generator (MCP) and then validated (and, when needed, repaired) by a verification wrapper to maximize the number of working examples.

## Folder layout

Top-level folders are categories. Examples are stored **directly inside category folders** as `.cs` files:

`<Category>/<ExampleName>.cs`

### Categories

- `comments/`

## How to build

```bash
dotnet --info
dotnet restore
dotnet build
```

## Contribution workflow

Changes are proposed via **Pull Requests** created by an agent account. A human reviewer approves and merges.

**Run ID:** `20260315_203408_65134f`
